title: Add user search endpoint
diff:
+def search_users(query):
+    sql = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%{query}%'"
+    return db.execute(sql).fetchall()

ground_truth.description: SQL injection via f-string concatenation in the query parameter. Use parameterised queries.
No input validation or sanitisation on the query parameter before database access.

title: Refactor payment processor
diff:
-class PaymentProcessor:
-    def process(self, amount, card):
-        return stripe.charge(amount, card)
+class PaymentProcessor:
+    def process(self, amount, card):
+        with self.lock:
+            result = stripe.charge(amount, card)
+            self.logger.info(f"Charged {amount}")
+            return result

ground_truth.description: No try/except around stripe.charge — exceptions will propagate with the lock held, but the log line will not execute if charge raises. Unclear error semantics.
self.lock is used without being defined in __init__ — this will raise AttributeError at runtime.
No changelog review or security audit for the dependency bump. axios 1.7 may contain breaking changes or CVE fixes that should be called out.
Dependency update not accompanied by test run evidence. Regression risk is not verified.

title: Fix user profile update bug
diff:
-def update_profile(user_id, data):
-    user = get_user(user_id)
-    user.update(data)
-    return user
+def update_profile(user_id, data):
+    user = get_user(user_id)
+    if user is None:
+        return None
+    user.update(data)
+    return user

ground_truth.description: The fix adds a null check but does not include a regression test for the None case.

title: Rename helper functions for clarity

ground_truth.description: Good rename — but no callers were updated in the same commit. Compilation will break until callers are updated.

title: Add caching to user lookup
diff:
+_cache = {}
+def get_user(user_id):
+    if user_id in _cache:
+        return _cache[user_id]
+    user = db.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).first()
+    _cache[user_id] = user
+    return user

ground_truth.description: Unbounded dictionary cache. Memory will grow without limit as new users are looked up. No eviction policy.
Cache stores None results for missing users but then re-queries because the None check fails on 'in _cache' logic. Also, any user updates won't be reflected.
4x memory and CPU increase without justification. Will affect pod scheduling, node capacity, and cost. No accompanying changes to HPA or cluster autoscaler config.
Limits are raised but requests not updated correspondingly — this will trigger QoS class change from Guaranteed to Burstable.

title: Add logging to authentication flow
diff:
+def authenticate(username, password):
+    logger.info(f"Login attempt for {username} with password {password}")
+    user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
+    if user and user.check_password(password):
+        return user
+    return None

ground_truth.description: Plaintext password logged to application logs. Critical security issue — logs are typically less protected than the auth system.
No rate limiting or timing attack protection. Failed login response time differs from successful login response time.

title: Improve error messages in file parser

ground_truth.description: Good fix for the unwrap. But the error message loses the file path context — debugging a parser error will require the caller to know which file was being parsed.

title: Add user retention dashboard

ground_truth.description: N+1 query pattern. Loads all users, then queries activity for each one individually. Will not scale beyond a few thousand users.
startDate and endDate parameters are accepted but never used in the query. The function returns all-time activity regardless of the date range.
